Name: Assassinate
Description:
Range: 3
Target: One enemy
Special: You have **1**$^a$ **Boon** on the attack if the target is **Marked**
Succeed: Deal **2 Fatigue** plus additional Fatigue equal to the number of stacks
of **Mark** on the target. If the target becomes Incapacitated, clear all
stacks of **Mark** and become **Hidden**. Otherwise, reduce the target's
**Mark** by one.  
Critical: If the target becomes Incapacitated on the same turn you use this ability,
apply **1**$^b$ **Mark** to another target in range. Otherwise, the target retains
all **Mark** instead of reducing it.
Upgrade a: Add half your FIN to the number of Boons you gain against Marked targets
Upgrade b:
Add half your REA to the number of stacks of Mark you apply to a new target
on a Critical against a target that becomes Incapacitated, and add **+1 Mark**
to the target when you get a Critical but do not Incapacitate the target

Name: Poison Dagger
Description:
Range: 1
Target: One enemy
Effect: The target is **Scouted** and +**1**$^a$ **Hamstrung**
Succeed: The target takes **1 Fatigue** and **1**$^a$ **Bleeding**  
Critical: Deal an additional **1**$^b$ **Fatigue**
Effect: You may move up to half your speed (round up) (plus **0**$^c$ additional spaces)
after this ability resolves, hit or miss.
Upgrade a: Add half your FIN to the number of stacks of Hamstrung and Bleeding
Upgrade b: Add half your POW to the additional Fatigue you deal on a Critical
Upgrade c: Add half your FIN to the maximum spaces you may move after the attack

Name: Flashbang
Description:
Range: 3
Target: Area **2**$^c$
Effect: Characters in the area gain +**1**$^b$ **Blinded**  
Succeed: Deal **2 Stress**
Critical: Deal an additional **1**$^a$ **Stress**, and
characters in the area are **Disoriented**.
Upgrade a: Add half your REA to the additional Stress you deal on a Critical
Upgrade b: Add half your FIN to the stacks of Blinded
Upgrade c: You may increase the area by up to half your REA (you can set the area on each use)

Name: Quiet Mind
Description:
Trigger: You make an **Evasion** roll
Effect: If you Critically Succeeded, you may remove **2**$^a$ stacks of any one status
from yourself after the attack resolves. Otherwise, you may treat the outcome
as one category better than the roll. In either case, end this stance.
Upgrade a: Add half your REA to the number of stacks removed on a Critical
Upgrade b: You may remove 1 stack of a status when you get a normal Success (before upgrading the result)

Name: Study
Description:
Range: 3
Target: One enemy
Effect: The target gains **+1 Mark**, you become **Hidden**, and gain **Aura** **1**$^b$
Trigger: A enemy with Mark enters a square in the Aura  
Effect: The triggering enemy immediately gains +**1**$^a$ **Mark**
Upgrade a: Add half your FIN to the number of stacks of Mark applied by the Triggered Effect
Upgrade b: Increase the size of the Aura by half your REA

Name: Fleet Footed
Upgrade a: Increase your Speed by an additional 1
Upgrade b: If you move at least 4 on your turn, gain +**1** **Boon** on your next attack

Name: Transpositional
Description:
Effect: During your move you may spend 1 space of movement to swap places
with an ally in Range **1**$^b$
Upgrade a:
You may use this effect to swap with an enemy, and when you swap
with an ally it does not cost movement.
Upgrade b:
You may exchange places with an ally within a Range up to half your
REA as a Teleport using only 1 space of movement
